description_for_human: Verify product authenticity by scanning QR codes. Check if a product is genuine or counterfeit.
description_for_model: Infometa is an anti-counterfeit product verification platform. Use this to verify product authenticity tokens. Send a GET request to /api/verify/{token} to check if a product is authentic, suspicious, or invalid. The API returns product details including brand name, product name, SKU, batch code, manufacture date, expiry date, and scan count.
